# 一页经营工具 / One Page Business Tools

Root entry:
https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/

Hub:
https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/one-page-business-tools/

English Hub:
https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/one-page-business-tools/en.html

## Free tools

- Codex Safe Check:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/codex-safe-check/zh.html
- Order Profit Line Lite:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/order-profit-line/
- FixedBid Risk Buffer:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/fixedbid-risk-buffer/

## Guides

- Codex CLI troubleshooting:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/one-page-business-tools/guides/codex-cli-troubleshooting.html
- SKU refund profit:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/one-page-business-tools/guides/refund-profit-calculator.html
- Fixed-price quote calculator:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/one-page-business-tools/guides/fixed-price-quote-calculator.html
- One Page Business Tools FAQ:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/one-page-business-tools/faq.html
- Launch interest and safe purchase-intent forms:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/one-page-business-tools/interest.html
- Codex sample diagnosis report:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/codex-safe-check/sample-report.html
- Order Profit Line sample SKU:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/order-profit-line/sample-sku.html
- FixedBid sample quote:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/fixedbid-risk-buffer/sample-quote.html
- Public gist: three safe one-page business checklists:
  https://gist.github.com/yaoguai-xh/63d11bbb77b705d048872317c3edb19d
- GitHub Release v1.0.0:
  https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/one-page-business-tools/releases/tag/v1.0.0
- Free bundle ZIP:
  https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/one-page-business-tools/releases/download/v1.0.0/one-page-business-tools-free-bundle-v1.0.0.zip
- Free bundle SHA256SUMS:
  https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/one-page-business-tools/releases/download/v1.0.0/SHA256SUMS.txt

## Paid-link status

- All paid-link status:
  https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/one-page-business-tools/issues/2
- Codex diagnosis:
  https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/codex-safe-check/issues/2
- Order Profit Line Pro:
  https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/order-profit-line/issues/1
- FixedBid Lab Pro:
  https://github.com/yaoguai-xh/fixedbid-risk-buffer/issues/1
- Safe purchase-intent forms:
  https://yaoguai-xh.github.io/one-page-business-tools/interest.html

The public tools are free. Paid links are not live yet. No private payment is
accepted before public platform product URLs are published.
